name: Minfeng Special Paper Co., Ltd.
summary: Minfeng Special Paper Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells papers in China. The company offers cigarette papers, including forming and cigarette tipping papers. It also provides industrial supporting papers, such as wet-strength label, aluminum base, glassine base, release, aluminized lining, aluminum foil backing, transfer printing, melamine plastic decal base, single-sided light medical wrapping, medical dialysis, capacitor and electrolytic capacitor, electronic power, and imitation parchment papers, as well as papers for meat food packaging. In addition, the company offers tracing, sublimation digital transfer, low igniting propensity cigarette, mint cigarette, moisturizing cigarette, flavored cigarette, ash-type cigarette, and damage-reducing cigarette papers; and paper rolls. The company was founded in 1923 and is based in Jiaxing, China.
